meta.title: OpenPrivacy.ch — Local anonymisation
meta.description: OpenPrivacy — anonymise personal data locally on your computer. Mac and Windows.

hero.title: Protect personal data in your case files, without sending them over the Internet
hero.lead: A simple app for lawyers and regulated professions: detect and anonymise names, contact details, dates and sensitive information — on your machine, no cloud.
hero.demoBeforeText:
Mr Jean Dupont, rue du Rhône 14, 1204 Geneva.
Contact: dupont@lawfirm.ch, tel. +41 22 731 45 67.

features.title: Built for non-technical users
features.intro: No command line, no complex setup. Open the app, paste your text or open a file, click Anonymise.
features.localText: Anonymisation runs on your computer. Your case files are not sent to a server during processing.
features.fastText: On first launch, the engine downloads once (~3 GB). After that, the tool is ready in seconds.
features.wordText: Open .docx files: formatting is preserved in the anonymised document. Text formats .txt, .md, etc.

types.title: What the tool detects
types.disclaimer: A tool to help reduce personal data — not a substitute for human review or a guarantee of GDPR compliance. See the model limitations.

access.title: Get your free licence key
access.intro: We store only your email and your key — never the content you anonymise. Processing stays 100% on your computer.
access.newTitle: Your activation key — shown only once
access.newWarning: Important: this key will no longer be visible on this site. Save it now (password manager, secure vault, encrypted note). You will need it to activate the app.
access.existingHint: For security reasons, your key is never shown again here. If you lost it, contact the team that referred you to OpenPrivacy.

download.title: Download the app
download.intro: After obtaining your key above, download the app for macOS. Windows version: coming soon. User guide (PDF).

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: No for the content of your documents: anonymisation is fully local. Online: sign-up (email), activation key verification, and the first engine download (~3 GB, once).
faq.q2: What do you store on your servers?
faq.a2: Only your email address, your key, the plan (free for now), and the date of the last key check. No text, files or anonymisation results.
faq.q3: I lost my key or can’t see it on the site
faq.a3: The key is shown only once when created, so others cannot retrieve it with your email. If you lost it, contact OpenPrivacy support — it remains available on the admin side, not on this public site.
faq.a4: Right-click the app → Open → confirm. Your IT department can also distribute a signed version.
faq.a5: Yes, in .docx format: open the file in the app, click Anonymise, then save Name_anonymised.docx (styles, tables and headers preserved). Legacy .doc files must be converted to .docx in Word.
faq.a6: The detector is based on the open-source openai/privacy-filter model (Apache 2.0 licence). OpenPrivacy is a simplified distribution for law firm use.

cta.title: Questions or firm-wide deployment?
cta.text: Contact the team that shared this link, or see the technical documentation to build installers.

errors.verifyInvalid: Invalid or already used confirmation link.
errors.verifyExpired: This link has expired. Please request a new key.
errors.verifyError: Unable to confirm email. Please try again later.
errors.turnstile: Please complete the anti-bot verification below.
errors.serverDown: Server unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.registerFail: Unable to create key. Please try again later.
errors.copyFail: Copy failed — select the key manually.
errors.pendingDefault: Check your inbox and click the confirmation link.
errors.existingDefault: A key already exists for this email.
